_comment: Trigger-eval cases for skills/track-and-count/SKILL.md. Each case has a prompt and a reason explaining the expected routing decision.

should_fire.prompt: Track how long shoppers spend in each aisle — I have RTSP streams
should_fire.reason: Dwell time + RTSP — classic track-and-count trigger; 'track how long shoppers spend' matches TRIGGER clause

should_fire.prompt: Count people entering and exiting through the front door
should_fire.reason: Line-cross counting with direction awareness — 'people counting at entrance' is a named TRIGGER example

should_fire.prompt: Alert me when a forklift enters Zone B
should_fire.reason: Zone-entry tracking with identity — 'track the forklift' and 'enters zone' match TRIGGER clause

should_fire.prompt: How many vehicles crossed the intersection in the last hour?
should_fire.reason: Line-cross count with identity — 'how many vehicles crossed' matches TRIGGER clause directly

should_fire.prompt: Follow each detected person across video frames and measure their path
should_fire.reason: Identity tracking across frames — 'follow each detected person across video frames' matches TRIGGER clause verbatim

should_fire.prompt: I need dwell time analytics for shoppers in my store — I have RTSP camera feeds
should_fire.reason: Dwell time + RTSP tracking — 'dwell time' matches TRIGGER clause directly

should_fire.prompt: Set up line-cross counting for vehicles at the facility entrance
should_fire.reason: Line-cross counting phrasing — 'line-cross counting' matches TRIGGER clause directly

should_fire.prompt: Video analytics with identity tracking for my warehouse cameras
should_fire.reason: Video analytics with identity — 'video analytics with identity' matches TRIGGER clause directly

should_not_fire.prompt: Count how many cars are in the parking lot right now
should_not_fire.reason: Per-frame count with no identity — 'count how many cars are in the parking lot' matches SKIP clause; routes to detect-and-analyze

should_not_fire.prompt: Is this product defective? Flag bad parts from the inspection camera.
should_not_fire.reason: Image-level verdict / classify — 'is this product defective' matches SKIP clause; routes to classify-or-flag

should_not_fire.prompt: Measure the crack area in millimeters squared from the surface image
should_not_fire.reason: Pixel-precise area / segmentation — 'measure the crack area' matches SKIP clause; routes to segment-and-analyze

should_not_fire.prompt: Read the serial number from this product label
should_not_fire.reason: Text extraction / OCR — 'read the serial number' matches SKIP clause; routes to read-text

should_not_fire.prompt: How much does managed deployment cost for five RTSP streams running 24/7?
should_not_fire.reason: Cost/scale question — 'how much does managed deployment cost' matches SKIP clause; routes to deployment-consultant

should_not_fire.prompt: Classify this whole image as pass or fail for the quality gate
should_not_fire.reason: Image-level pass/fail classification — 'classify this image as pass/fail' matches SKIP clause; routes to classify-or-flag

should_not_fire.prompt: Segment the tumor area in this MRI scan and measure its size
should_not_fire.reason: Pixel-precise segmentation — 'segment' matches SKIP clause; routes to segment-and-analyze

should_not_fire.prompt: I already have a working tracker — how do I export the tracking results to CSV?
should_not_fire.reason: User already has working tracker and asks only about export — 'already has working tracker' matches SKIP clause
